message:
fix: Remove claude_bundle auto-detection causing 46MB benchmark builds

The wasm-static build was checking for claude_bundle_compiled.c (266MB)
and using it instead of the actual bundle_compiled.c generated by
edgeboxc build. This caused benchmark AOT files to be 46MB instead of
3MB, with 14 second cold starts instead of 39ms.

Fix: Always use bundle_compiled.c which edgeboxc build generates for
the target JS file.

files.patch:
@@ -69,4 +69,4 @@ frozen_functions.c
 frozen_manifest.json
 bundle_original.c
 .repl_history
-.!*.js
\ No newline at end of file
+claude_bundle_compiled.c
